verses.latin_vulgate: In vigesimo quinto anno transmigrationis nostræ, in exordio anni, decima mensis, quartodecimo anno postquam percussa est civitas, in ipsa hac die, facta est super me manus Domini, et adduxit me illuc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּעֶשְׂרִ֣ים וְחָמֵ֣שׁ שָׁנָ֣ה לְ֠גָלוּתֵ֠נוּ בְּרֹ֨אשׁ הַשָּׁנָ֜ה בֶּעָשׂ֣וֹר לַחֹ֗דֶשׁ בְּאַרְבַּ֤ע עֶשְׂרֵה֙ שָׁנָ֔ה אַחַ֕ר אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֻכְּתָ֖ה הָעִ֑יר בְּעֶ֣צֶם ׀ הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֗ה הָיְתָ֤ה עָלַי֙ יַד־יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיָּבֵ֥א אֹתִ֖י שָֽׁמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the five and twentieth year of our captivity, in the beginning of the year, the tenth day of the month, the fourteenth year after the city was destroyed: in the selfsame day the hand of the Lord was upon me, and he brought me thither.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viidentenä vuotena kolmattakymmentä meidän vankiudestamme, vuoden alussa, kymmenentenä päivänä ensimmäisessä kuukaudessa, se on neljästoistakymmenes vuosi, sittekuin kaupunki hävitettiin, juuri sinä päivänä tuli Herran käsi minun päälleni, ja vei minun sinne.
verses.king_james: In the five and twentieth year of our captivity, in the beginning of the year, in the tenth day of the month, in the fourteenth year after that the city was smitten, in the selfsame day the hand of the Lord was upon me, and brought me thither.

verses.latin_vulgate: In visionibus Dei adduxit me in terram Israël, et dimisit me super montem excelsum nimis, super quem erat quasi ædificium civitatis vergentis ad austrum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּמַרְא֣וֹת אֱלֹהִ֔ים הֱבִיאַ֖נִי אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיְנִיחֵ֗נִי אֶל־הַ֤ר גָּבֹ֙הַּ֙ מְאֹ֔ד וְעָלָ֥יו כְּמִבְנֵה־עִ֖יר מִנֶּֽגֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the visions of God he brought me into the land of Israel, and set me upon a very high mountain: upon which there was as the building of a city, bending towards the south.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jumalan näyissä vei hän minut Israelin maalle ja asetti minun sangen korkialle vuorelle; ja siellä oli niinkuin rakennettu kaupunki etelään päin.
verses.king_james: In the visions of God brought he me into the land of Israel, and set me upon a very high mountain, by which was as the frame of a city on the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me illuc : et ecce vir cujus erat species quasi species æris, et funiculus lineus in manu ejus, et calamus mensuræ in manu ejus : stabat autem in porta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֵ֨יא אוֹתִ֜י שָׁ֗מָּה וְהִנֵּה־אִישׁ֙ מַרְאֵ֙הוּ֙ כְּמַרְאֵ֣ה נְחֹ֔שֶׁת וּפְתִיל־פִּשְׁתִּ֥ים בְּיָד֖וֹ וּקְנֵ֣ה הַמִּדָּ֑ה וְה֥וּא עֹמֵ֖ד בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me in thither, and behold a man, whose appearance was like the appearance of brass, with a line of flax in his hand, and a measuring reed in his hand, and he stood in the gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska näyissä vei hän minut Israelin maalle ja asetti minun sangen korkialle vuorelle; ja siellä oli niinkuin rakennettu kaupunki etelään päin.
verses.king_james: And he brought me thither, and, behold, there was a man, whose appearance was like the appearance of brass, with a line of flax in his hand, and a measuring reed; and he stood in the gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et locutus est ad me idem vir : Fili hominis, vide oculis tuis, et auribus tuis audi, et pone cor tuum in omnia quæ ego ostendam tibi, quia ut ostendantur tibi adductus es huc. Annuntia omnia quæ tu vides domui Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֨ר אֵלַ֜י הָאִ֗ישׁ בֶּן־אָדָ֡ם רְאֵ֣ה בְעֵינֶ֩יךָ֩ וּבְאׇזְנֶ֨יךָ שְּׁמָ֜ע וְשִׂ֣ים לִבְּךָ֗ לְכֹ֤ל אֲשֶׁר־אֲנִי֙ מַרְאֶ֣ה אוֹתָ֔ךְ כִּ֛י לְמַ֥עַן הַרְאוֹתְכָ֖ה הֻבָ֣אתָה הֵ֑נָּה הַגֵּ֛ד אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־אַתָּ֥ה רֹאֶ֖ה לְבֵ֥ית יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this man said to me: Son of man, see with thy eyes, and hear with thy ears, and set thy heart upon all that I shall shew thee: for thou art brought hither that they may be shewn to thee: declare all that thou seest, to the house of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se mies sanoi minulle: sinä, ihmisen poika, katso silmilläs ja kuule korvillas, ja pane sydämees kaikki, mitä minä sinulle osoitan; sillä sentähden olen minä sinun tänne tuonut osoittaakseni sinulle, ettäs kaikki ne, mitkä sinä tässä näet, Israelin huoneelle ilmoittaisit.
verses.king_james: And the man said unto me, Son of man, behold with thine eyes, and hear with thine ears, and set thine heart upon all that I shall shew thee; for to the intent that I might shew them unto thee art thou brought hither: declare all that thou seest to the house of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ecce murus forinsecus in circuitu domus undique : et in manu viri calamus mensuræ sex cubitorum et palmo : et mensus est latitudinem ædificii calamo uno, altitudinem quoque calamo uno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֥ה חוֹמָ֛ה מִח֥וּץ לַבַּ֖יִת סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב וּבְיַ֨ד הָאִ֜ישׁ קְנֵ֣ה הַמִּדָּ֗ה שֵׁשׁ־אַמּ֤וֹת בָּֽאַמָּה֙ וָטֹ֔פַח וַיָּ֜מׇד אֶת־רֹ֤חַב הַבִּנְיָן֙ קָנֶ֣ה אֶחָ֔ד וְקוֹמָ֖ה קָנֶ֥ה אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And behold there was a wall on the outside of the house round about, and in the man's hand a measuring reed of six cubits and a handbreadth: and he measured the breadth of the building one reed, and the height one reed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katso, muuri oli ulkonaisella puolella ympäri kaiken huoneen. Ja miehellä oli mittariuku kädessä, kuusi kyynärää ja kämmenen leveyden pitkä; ja hän mittasi rakennuksen leveydelle ja korkeudelle, kaikki yhdellä riuvulla.
verses.king_james: And behold a wall on the outside of the house round about, and in the man’s hand a measuring reed of six cubits long by the cubit and an hand breadth: so he measured the breadth of the building, one reed; and the height, one reed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et venit ad portam quæ respiciebat viam orientalem, et ascendit per gradus ejus : et mensus est limen portæ calamo uno latitudinem, id est, limen unum calamo uno in latitudine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּב֗וֹא אֶל־שַׁ֙עַר֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר פָּנָיו֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַקָּדִ֔ימָה וַיַּ֖עַל בְּמַעֲלוֹתָ֑ו וַיָּ֣מׇד ׀ אֶת־סַ֣ף הַשַּׁ֗עַר קָנֶ֤ה אֶחָד֙ רֹ֔חַב וְאֵת֙ סַ֣ף אֶחָ֔ד קָנֶ֥ה אֶחָ֖ד רֹֽחַב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he came to the gate that looked toward the east, and he went up the steps thereof: and he measured the breadth of the threshold of the gate one reed, that is, one threshold was one reed broad;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuli portin tykö, joka oli itään päin, ja meni ylös hänen astuimistansa; ja mittasi portin kynnyksen, kummankin yhden riukumitan leveäksi.
verses.king_james: Then came he unto the gate which looketh toward the east, and went up the stairs thereof, and measured the threshold of the gate, which was one reed broad; and the other threshold of the gate, which was one reed broad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et thalamum uno calamo in longum, et uno calamo in latum : et inter thalamos, quinque cubitos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַתָּ֗א קָנֶ֨ה אֶחָ֥ד אֹ֙רֶךְ֙ וְקָנֶ֤ה אֶחָד֙ רֹ֔חַב וּבֵ֥ין הַתָּאִ֖ים חָמֵ֣שׁ אַמּ֑וֹת וְסַ֣ף הַ֠שַּׁ֠עַר מֵאֵ֨צֶל אֻלָ֥ם הַשַּׁ֛עַר מֵהַבַּ֖יִת קָנֶ֥ה אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And every little chamber was one reed long, and one reed broad: and between the little chambers were five cubits:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kammiot, jotka olivat molemmilla puolilla porttia, mittasi hän myös yhden riukumitan leveäksi, ja kammioiden välin viisi kyynärää leveäksi, ja hän mittasi myös portin kynnyksen, esihuoneen portin tykönä sisimäisellä puolella, yhden riukumitan.
verses.king_james: And every little chamber was one reed long, and one reed broad; and between the little chambers were five cubits; and the threshold of the gate by the porch of the gate within was one reed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et limen portæ, juxta vestibulum portæ intrinsecus, calamo uno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֜מׇד אֶת־אֻלָ֥ם הַשַּׁ֛עַר מֵהַבַּ֖יִת קָנֶ֥ה אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the threshold of the gate by the porch of the gate within, was one reed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja mittasi portin esihuoneen sisimäisellä puolella yhden riukumitan.
verses.king_james: He measured also the porch of the gate within, one reed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est vestibulum portæ octo cubitorum, et frontem ejus duobus cubitis : vestibulum autem portæ erat intrinsecus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֜מׇד אֶת־אֻלָ֤ם הַשַּׁ֙עַר֙ שְׁמֹנֶ֣ה אַמּ֔וֹת וְאֵילָ֖ו שְׁתַּ֣יִם אַמּ֑וֹת וְאֻלָ֥ם הַשַּׁ֖עַר מֵהַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the porch of the gate eight cubits, and the front thereof two cubits: and the porch of the gate was inward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja mittasi esihuoneen portin kahdeksan kyynärää ja sen kynnykset kaksi kyynärää, ja esihuoneen portin sisimmäisellä puolella.
verses.king_james: Then measured he the porch of the gate, eight cubits; and the posts thereof, two cubits; and the porch of the gate was inward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro thalami portæ ad viam orientalem, tres hinc et tres inde : mensura una trium, et mensura una frontium ex utraque parte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתָאֵ֨י הַשַּׁ֜עַר דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַקָּדִ֗ים שְׁלֹשָׁ֤ה מִפֹּה֙ וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה מִפֹּ֔ה מִדָּ֥ה אַחַ֖ת לִשְׁלׇשְׁתָּ֑ם וּמִדָּ֥ה אַחַ֛ת לָאֵילִ֖ם מִפֹּ֥ה וּמִפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the little chambers of the gate that looked eastward were three on this side, and three on that side: all three were of one measure, and the fronts of one measure, on both parts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kammioita oli kolme kummallakin puolella, portin tykönä itään päin, yksi niin avara kuin toinenkin. Ja molemmilla puolilla olivat kynnykset, jotka olivat yhdensuuruiset.
verses.king_james: And the little chambers of the gate eastward were three on this side, and three on that side; they three were of one measure: and the posts had one measure on this side and on that side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est latitudinem liminis portæ decem cubitorum, et longitudinem portæ tredecim cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛מׇד אֶת־רֹ֥חַב פֶּתַח־הַשַּׁ֖עַר עֶ֣שֶׂר אַמּ֑וֹת אֹ֣רֶךְ הַשַּׁ֔עַר שְׁל֥וֹשׁ עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the breadth of the threshold of the gate ten cubits: and the length of the gate thirteen cubits:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte mittasi hän oven leveyden kymmenen kyynärää ja portin korkeuden kolmetoistakymmentä kyynärää.
verses.king_james: And he measured the breadth of the entry of the gate, ten cubits; and the length of the gate, thirteen cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et marginem ante thalamos, cubiti unius, et cubitus unus finis utrimque : thalami autem sex cubitorum erant hinc et inde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּגְב֞וּל לִפְנֵ֤י הַתָּאוֹת֙ אַמָּ֣ה אֶחָ֔ת וְאַמָּֽה־אַחַ֥ת גְּב֖וּל מִפֹּ֑ה וְהַתָּ֕א שֵׁשׁ־אַמּ֣וֹת מִפּ֔וֹ וְשֵׁ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת מִפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the border before the little chambers one cubit: and one cubit was the border on both sides: and the little chambers were six cubits on this side and that side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kammioin edessä oli sia molemmilla puolilla, kyynärän leveydeltä; mutta kammiot olivat kuusi kyynärää molemmille puolille.
verses.king_james: The space also before the little chambers was one cubit on this side, and the space was one cubit on that side: and the little chambers were six cubits on this side, and six cubits on that side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est portam a tecto thalami usque ad tectum ejus, latitudinem viginti quinque cubitorum, ostium contra ostium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣מׇד אֶת־הַשַּׁ֗עַר מִגַּ֤ג הַתָּא֙ לְגַגּ֔וֹ רֹ֕חַב עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְחָמֵ֖שׁ אַמּ֑וֹת פֶּ֖תַח נֶ֥גֶד פָּֽתַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the gate from the roof of one little chamber to the roof of another, in breadth five and twenty cubits: door against door.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi portin, yhden kammion katosta toiseen, viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveydelle; ja ovet olivat suutasuuksin.
verses.king_james: He measured then the gate from the roof of one little chamber to the roof of another: the breadth was five and twenty cubits, door against door.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit frontes per sexaginta cubitos, et ad frontem atrium portæ undique per circuitum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־אֵילִ֖ים שִׁשִּׁ֣ים אַמָּ֑ה וְאֶל־אֵיל֙ הֶחָצֵ֔ר הַשַּׁ֖עַר סָבִ֥יב ׀ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also fronts of sixty cubits: and to the front the court of the gate on every side round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös oven päälliset kuusikymmentä kyynärää ja esihuoneen oven päällisen yltäylitse porttia.
verses.king_james: He made also posts of threescore cubits, even unto the post of the court round about the gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ante faciem portæ quæ pertingebat usque ad faciem vestibuli portæ interioris, quinquaginta cubitos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֗ל פְּנֵי֙ הַשַּׁ֣עַר (היאתון) [הָאִית֔וֹן] עַל־לִפְנֵ֕י אֻלָ֥ם הַשַּׁ֖עַר הַפְּנִימִ֑י חֲמִשִּׁ֖ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And before the face of the gate which reached even to the face of the porch of the inner gate, fifty cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja portin läpikäytävästä esihuoneen tykö sisimäiseen porttiin oli viisikymmentä kyynärää.
verses.king_james: And from the face of the gate of the entrance unto the face of the porch of the inner gate were fifty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fenestras obliquas in thalamis et in frontibus eorum, quæ erant intra portam undique per circuitum : similiter autem erant et in vestibulis fenestræ per gyrum intrinsecus, et ante frontes pictura palmarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחַלּוֹנ֣וֹת אֲטֻמ֣וֹת אֶֽל־הַתָּאִ֡ים וְאֶל֩ אֵלֵיהֵ֨מָה לִפְנִ֤ימָה לַשַּׁ֙עַר֙ סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֔יב וְכֵ֖ן לָאֵֽלַמּ֑וֹת וְחַלּוֹנ֞וֹת סָבִ֤יב ׀ סָבִיב֙ לִפְנִ֔ימָה וְאֶל־אַ֖יִל תִּמֹרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And slanting windows in the little chambers, and in their fronts, which were within the gate on every side round about: and in like manner there were also in the porches windows round about within, and before the fronts the representation of palm trees.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siinä olivat ahtaat akkunat kammioissa ja päällisissä, sisimäisellä puolella yltäylitse portin; juuri niin oli myös sisäpuolella kaikki ympäri, ja oven päällisessä olivat kauniit palmupuut.
verses.king_james: And there were narrow windows to the little chambers, and to their posts within the gate round about, and likewise to the arches: and windows were round about inward: and upon each post were palm trees.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit me ad atrium exterius : et ecce gazophylacia, et pavimentum stratum lapide in atrio per circuitum : triginta gazophylacia in circuitu pavimenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִיאֵ֗נִי אֶל־הֶחָצֵר֙ הַחִ֣יצוֹנָ֔ה וְהִנֵּ֤ה לְשָׁכוֹת֙ וְרִֽצְפָ֔ה עָשׂ֥וּי לֶחָצֵ֖ר סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים לְשָׁכ֖וֹת אֶל־הָרִֽצְפָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the outward court, and behold there were chambers, and a pavement of stone in the court round about: thirty chambers encompassed the pavement.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei minun vielä edemmäksi äärimäiseen kartanoon, ja katso, siellä olivat majat, ja permanto laskettu kartanon yli ympäri, ja kolmekymmentä kammiota permannolla.
verses.king_james: Then brought he me into the outward court, and, lo, there were chambers, and a pavement made for the court round about: thirty chambers were upon the pavement.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pavimentum in fronte portarum, secundum longitudinem portarum erat inferius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָרִֽצְפָה֙ אֶל־כֶּ֣תֶף הַשְּׁעָרִ֔ים לְעֻמַּ֖ת אֹ֣רֶךְ הַשְּׁעָרִ֑ים הָרִֽצְפָ֖ה הַתַּחְתּוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the pavement in the front of the gates according to the length of the gates was lower.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja permanto oli molemmissa porteissa niin pitkä kuin portitkin olivat; ja tämä oli alimainen permanto.
verses.king_james: And the pavement by the side of the gates over against the length of the gates was the lower pavement.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est latitudinem a facie portæ inferioris usque ad frontem atrii interioris extrinsecus : centum cubitos ad orientem et ad aquilonem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣מׇד רֹ֡חַב מִלִּפְנֵי֩ הַשַּׁ֨עַר הַתַּחְתּ֜וֹנָה לִפְנֵ֨י הֶחָצֵ֧ר הַפְּנִימִ֛י מִח֖וּץ מֵאָ֣ה אַמָּ֑ה הַקָּדִ֖ים וְהַצָּפֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the breadth from the face of the lower gate to the front of the inner court without, a hundred cubits to the east, and to the north.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi alimaisesta portista leveyden sisimäiseen kartanoon asti ulkopuolelta, sata kyynärää itään ja pohjaan.
verses.king_james: Then he measured the breadth from the forefront of the lower gate unto the forefront of the inner court without, an hundred cubits eastward and northward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Portam quoque quæ respiciebat viam aquilonis atrii exterioris, mensus est tam in longitudine quam in latitudine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַשַּׁ֗עַר אֲשֶׁ֤ר פָּנָיו֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַצָּפ֔וֹן לֶחָצֵ֖ר הַחִיצוֹנָ֑ה מָדַ֥ד אׇרְכּ֖וֹ וְרׇחְבּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He measured also both the length and the breadth of the gate of the outward court, which looked northward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän myös mittasi pohjaportin äärimäiseen kartanoon asti, pituudelle ja leveydelle.
verses.king_james: And the gate of the outward court that looked toward the north, he measured the length thereof, and the breadth thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et thalamos ejus tres hinc et tres inde, et frontem ejus et vestibulum ejus secundum mensuram portæ prioris, quinquaginta cubitorum longitudinem ejus, et latitudinem viginti quinque cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתָאָ֗ו שְׁלוֹשָׁ֤ה מִפּוֹ֙ וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה מִפּ֔וֹ וְאֵילָ֤ו וְאֵֽלַמָּו֙ הָיָ֔ה כְּמִדַּ֖ת הַשַּׁ֣עַר הָרִאשׁ֑וֹן חֲמִשִּׁ֤ים אַמָּה֙ אׇרְכּ֔וֹ וְרֹ֕חַב חָמֵ֥שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים בָּאַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the little chambers thereof three on this side, and three on that side: and the front thereof, and the porch thereof according to the measure of the former gate, fifty cubits long, and five and twenty cubits broad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siinä oli myös jokaisella sivulla kolme kammiota; ja hänen oven päällisensä ja esihuoneensa olivat yhdensuuruiset, niinkuin entisenkin portin, viisikymmentä kyynärää pituudelle ja viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveydelle.
verses.king_james: And the little chambers thereof were three on this side and three on that side; and the posts thereof and the arches thereof were after the measure of the first gate: the length thereof was fifty cubits, and the breadth five and twenty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fenestræ autem ejus, et vestibulum, et sculpturæ secundum mensuram portæ quæ respiciebat ad orientem : et septem graduum erat ascensus ejus, et vestibulum ante eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחַלּוֹנָ֤ו וְאֵֽילַמָּו֙ וְתִ֣ימֹרָ֔ו כְּמִדַּ֣ת הַשַּׁ֔עַר אֲשֶׁ֥ר פָּנָ֖יו דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַקָּדִ֑ים וּבְמַעֲל֥וֹת שֶׁ֙בַע֙ יַעֲלוּ־ב֔וֹ וְאֵילַמָּ֖ו לִפְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the windows thereof, and the porch, and the gravings according to the measure of the gate that looked to the east, and they went up to it by seven steps, and a porch was before it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen akkunansa, esihuoneensa ja palmupuunsa olivat niinkuin itäisenkin portin, ja siinä oli myös seitsemän astuinta, joita myöten mentiin ylös, ja esihuone oli sen edessä.
verses.king_james: And their windows, and their arches, and their palm trees, were after the measure of the gate that looketh toward the east; and they went up unto it by seven steps; and the arches thereof were before them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et porta atrii interioris contra portam aquilonis et orientalem : et mensus est a porta usque ad portam centum cubitos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁ֙עַר֙ לֶחָצֵ֣ר הַפְּנִימִ֔י נֶ֣גֶד הַשַּׁ֔עַר לַצָּפ֖וֹן וְלַקָּדִ֑ים וַיָּ֧מׇד מִשַּׁ֛עַר אֶל־שַׁ֖עַר מֵאָ֥ה אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the gate of the inner court was over against the gate of the north, and that of the east: and he measured from gate to gate a hundred cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sisimäisen esihuoneen portti oli pohjoisen ja itäisen portin kohdalla; ja hän mittasi sata kyynärää yhdestä portista niin toiseen.
verses.king_james: And the gate of the inner court was over against the gate toward the north, and toward the east; and he measured from gate to gate an hundred cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit me ad viam australem : et ecce porta quæ respiciebat ad austrum : et mensus est frontem ejus et vestibulum ejus juxta mensuras superiores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹלִכֵ֙נִי֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַדָּר֔וֹם וְהִנֵּה־שַׁ֖עַר דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַדָּר֑וֹם וּמָדַ֤ד אֵילָו֙ וְאֵ֣ילַמָּ֔ו כַּמִּדּ֖וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me out to the way of the south, and behold the gate that looked to the south: and he measured the front thereof, and the porch thereof according to the former measures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte vei hän minun myös etelään päin, ja katso, siellä oli myös yksi portti; ja hän mittasi hänen ovensa päälliset ja esihuoneensa niin suureksi kuin ne muutkin.
verses.king_james: After that he brought me toward the south, and behold a gate toward the south: and he measured the posts thereof and the arches thereof according to these measures.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fenestras ejus, et vestibula in circuitu, sicut fenestras ceteras : quinquaginta cubitorum longitudine, et latitudine viginti quinque cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחַלּוֹנִ֨ים ל֤וֹ וּלְאֵֽילַמָּו֙ סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֔יב כְּהַחַלֹּנ֖וֹת הָאֵ֑לֶּה חֲמִשִּׁ֤ים אַמָּה֙ אֹ֔רֶךְ וְרֹ֕חַב חָמֵ֥שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the windows thereof, and the porches round about, as the other windows: the length was fifty cubits, and the breadth five and twenty cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siinä olivat myös akkunat ja esihuoneet yltympäri niinkuin muutkin akkunat, viisikymmentä kyynärää pitkät ja viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveät.
verses.king_james: And there were windows in it and in the arches thereof round about, like those windows: the length was fifty cubits, and the breadth five and twenty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in gradibus septem ascendebatur ad eam, et vestibulum ante fores ejus : et cælatæ palmæ erant, una hinc, et altera inde, in fronte ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַעֲל֤וֹת שִׁבְעָה֙ עֹֽלוֹתָ֔ו וְאֵלַמָּ֖ו לִפְנֵיהֶ֑ם וְתִמֹרִ֣ים ל֗וֹ אֶחָ֥ד מִפּ֛וֹ וְאֶחָ֥ד מִפּ֖וֹ אֶל־אֵילָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were seven steps to go up to it: and a porch before the doors thereof: and there were graven palm trees, one on this side, and another on that side in the front thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siinä oli myös seitsemän astuinta ylöspäin, ja esihuone sen edessä; ja palmupuut joka sivulla sen oven päällisissä.
verses.king_james: And there were seven steps to go up to it, and the arches thereof were before them: and it had palm trees, one on this side, and another on that side, upon the posts thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et porta atrii interioris in via australi : et mensus est a porta usque ad portam in via australi, centum cubitos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁ֛עַר לֶחָצֵ֥ר הַפְּנִימִ֖י דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַדָּר֑וֹם וַיָּ֨מׇד מִשַּׁ֧עַר אֶל־הַשַּׁ֛עַר דֶּ֥רֶךְ הַדָּר֖וֹם מֵאָ֥ה אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was a gate of the inner court towards the south: and he measured from gate to gate towards the south, a hundred cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi myös sisimäisen kartanon portin etelään päin, sata kyynärää yhdestä eteläportista toiseen.
verses.king_james: And there was a gate in the inner court toward the south: and he measured from gate to gate toward the south an hundred cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me in atrium interius ad portam australem : et mensus est portam juxta mensuras superiores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִיאֵ֛נִי אֶל־חָצֵ֥ר הַפְּנִימִ֖י בְּשַׁ֣עַר הַדָּר֑וֹם וַיָּ֙מׇד֙ אֶת־הַשַּׁ֣עַר הַדָּר֔וֹם כַּמִּדּ֖וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the inner court at the south gate: and he measured the gate according to the former measures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei minun eteläportin kautta sisimäiseen kartanoon, ja mittasi sen portin etelään päin, niin suureksi kuin muutkin,
verses.king_james: And he brought me to the inner court by the south gate: and he measured the south gate according to these measures;

verses.latin_vulgate: Thalamum ejus, et frontem ejus, et vestibulum ejus eisdem mensuris, et fenestras ejus, et vestibulum ejus in circuitu, quinquaginta cubitos longitudinis, et latitudinis viginti quinque cubitos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתָאָ֞ו וְאֵילָ֤ו וְאֵֽלַמָּו֙ כַּמִּדּ֣וֹת הָאֵ֔לֶּה וְחַלּוֹנ֥וֹת ל֛וֹ וּלְאֵלַמָּ֖ו סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב חֲמִשִּׁ֤ים אַמָּה֙ אֹ֔רֶךְ וְרֹ֕חַב עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְחָמֵ֖שׁ אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The little chamber thereof, and the front thereof, and the porch thereof with the same measures: and the windows thereof, and the porch thereof round about it was fifty cubits in length, and five and twenty cubits in breadth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen kammionsa, ja oviensa päälliset, ja esihuoneensa juuri sillä suuruudella ja hänen akkunansa ja esihuoneensa joka taholta, viisikymmentä kyynärää pituudelle ja viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveydelle.
verses.king_james: And the little chambers thereof, and the posts thereof, and the arches thereof, according to these measures: and there were windows in it and in the arches thereof round about: it was fifty cubits long, and five and twenty cubits broad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vestibulum per gyrum longitudine viginti quinque cubitorum, et latitudine quinque cubitorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵלַמּ֖וֹת סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב אֹ֗רֶךְ חָמֵ֤שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִים֙ אַמָּ֔ה וְרֹ֖חַב חָמֵ֥שׁ אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the porch round about was five and twenty cubits long, and five cubits broad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siinä olivat esihuoneet ympärillä, viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää pitkät ja viisi kyynärää leveät.
verses.king_james: And the arches round about were five and twenty cubits long, and five cubits broad.

verses.latin_vulgate: et vestibulum ejus ad atrium exterius, et palmas ejus in fronte : et octo gradus erant quibus ascendebatur per eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵלַמָּ֗ו אֶל־חָצֵר֙ הַחִ֣צוֹנָ֔ה וְתִמֹרִ֖ים אֶל־אֵילָ֑ו וּמַעֲל֥וֹת שְׁמוֹנֶ֖ה מַעֲלָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the porch thereof to the outward court, and the palm trees thereof in the front: and there were eight steps to go up to it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen esihuoneensa olivat äärimäisen kartanon edessä, ja palmupuut hänen ovensa päällisissä; ja siinä oli kahdeksan astuinta, joita myöten mentiin ylös.
verses.king_james: And the arches thereof were toward the utter court; and palm trees were upon the posts thereof: and the going up to it had eight steps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me in atrium interius, per viam orientalem : et mensus est portam secundum mensuras superiores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִיאֵ֛נִי אֶל־הֶחָצֵ֥ר הַפְּנִימִ֖י דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַקָּדִ֑ים וַיָּ֣מׇד אֶת־הַשַּׁ֔עַר כַּמִּדּ֖וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the inner court by the way of the east: and he measured the gate according to the former measures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte vei hän myös minun sisimäiseen porttiin itään päin ja mittasi sen portin niin suureksi kuin muutkin;
verses.king_james: And he brought me into the inner court toward the east: and he measured the gate according to these measures.

verses.latin_vulgate: Thalamum ejus, et frontem ejus, et vestibulum ejus, sicut supra : et fenestras ejus, et vestibula ejus in circuitu, longitudine quinquaginta cubitorum, et latitudine viginti quinque cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתָאָ֞ו וְאֵלָ֤ו וְאֵֽלַמָּו֙ כַּמִּדּ֣וֹת הָאֵ֔לֶּה וְחַלּוֹנ֥וֹת ל֛וֹ וּלְאֵלַמָּ֖ו סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב אֹ֚רֶךְ חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים אַמָּ֔ה וְרֹ֕חַב חָמֵ֥שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The little chamber thereof, and the front thereof, and the porch thereof as before: and the windows thereof, and the porches thereof round about it was fifty cubits long, and five and twenty cubits broad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen kammioinsa, oviensa päälliset ja esihuoneensa, ja heidän akkunansa ja esihuoneensa entisen suuruiseksi ympärinsä, viisikymmentä kyynärää pitkäksi ja viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveäksi.
verses.king_james: And the little chambers thereof, and the posts thereof, and the arches thereof, were according to these measures: and there were windows therein and in the arches thereof round about: it was fifty cubits long, and five and twenty cubits broad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vestibulum ejus, id est, atrii exterioris, et palmæ cælatæ in fronte ejus, hinc et inde : et in octo gradibus ascensus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵלַמָּ֗ו לֶחָצֵר֙ הַחִ֣יצוֹנָ֔ה וְתִמֹרִ֥ים אֶל־אֵלָ֖ו מִפּ֣וֹ וּמִפּ֑וֹ וּשְׁמֹנֶ֥ה מַעֲל֖וֹת מַעֲלָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the porch thereof, that is, of the outward court: and the graven palm trees in the front thereof on this side and on that side: and the going up thereof was by eight steps.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänellä oli myös esihuonee äärimäisen kartanon kohdalla, ja palmupuita oven päällisissä molemmilla sivuilla, ja kahdeksan astuinta ylöspäin.
verses.king_james: And the arches thereof were toward the outward court; and palm trees were upon the posts thereof, on this side, and on that side: and the going up to it had eight steps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me ad portam quæ respiciebat ad aquilonem : et mensus est secundum mensuras superiores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִיאֵ֖נִי אֶל־שַׁ֣עַר הַצָּפ֑וֹן וּמָדַ֖ד כַּמִּדּ֥וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the gate that looked to the north: and he measured according to the former measures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte vei hän minun pohjan puoliseen porttiin; sen hän mittasi niin suureksi kuin ne muutkin,
verses.king_james: And he brought me to the north gate, and measured it according to these measures;

verses.latin_vulgate: Thalamum ejus, et frontem ejus, et vestibulum ejus, et fenestras ejus per circuitum, longitudine quinquaginta cubitorum, et latitudine viginti quinque cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּאָו֙ אֵלָ֣ו וְאֵלַמָּ֔ו וְחַלּוֹנ֥וֹת ל֖וֹ סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב אֹ֚רֶךְ חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים אַמָּ֔ה וְרֹ֕חַב חָמֵ֥שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִ֖ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The little chamber thereof, and the front thereof, and the porch thereof, and the windows thereof round about it was fifty cubits long, and five and twenty cubits broad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen kammionsa, oviensa päällisten, esihuoneidensa ja heidän akkunainsa kanssa siinä ympärillä, viisikymmentä kyynärää pitkäksi ja viisikolmattakymmentä kyynärää leveäksi.
verses.king_james: The little chambers thereof, the posts thereof, and the arches thereof, and the windows to it round about: the length was fifty cubits, and the breadth five and twenty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vestibulum ejus respiciebat ad atrium exterius : et cælatura palmarum in fronte ejus, hinc et inde : et in octo gradibus ascensus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵילָ֗ו לֶחָצֵר֙ הַחִ֣יצוֹנָ֔ה וְתִמֹרִ֥ים אֶל־אֵילָ֖ו מִפּ֣וֹ וּמִפּ֑וֹ וּשְׁמֹנֶ֥ה מַעֲל֖וֹת מַעֲלָֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the porch thereof looked to the outward court: and the graving of palm trees in the front thereof was on this side and on that side: and the going up to it was by eight steps.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänellä oli myös esihuone äärimäisen kartanon kohdalla, ja palmupuut ovenpäällisissä molemmilla puolilla, ja kahdeksan astuinta ylöspäin.
verses.king_james: And the posts thereof were toward the utter court; and palm trees were upon the posts thereof, on this side, and on that side: and the going up to it had eight steps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et per singula gazophylacia ostium in frontibus portarum : ibi lavabant holocaustum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִשְׁכָּ֣ה וּפִתְחָ֔הּ בְּאֵילִ֖ים הַשְּׁעָרִ֑ים שָׁ֖ם יָדִ֥יחוּ אֶת־הָעֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And at every chamber was a door in the forefronts of the gates: there they washed the holocaust.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siellä oli kammio, ja sen ovi oli porttien pihtipielissä, kussa polttouhri pestiin.
verses.king_james: And the chambers and the entries thereof were by the posts of the gates, where they washed the burnt offering.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in vestibulo portæ, duæ mensæ hinc, et duæ mensæ inde, ut immoletur super eas holocaustum, et pro peccato et pro delicto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְאֻלָ֣ם הַשַּׁ֗עַר שְׁנַ֤יִם שֻׁלְחָנוֹת֙ מִפּ֔וֹ וּשְׁנַ֥יִם שֻׁלְחָנ֖וֹת מִפֹּ֑ה לִשְׁח֤וֹט אֲלֵיהֶם֙ הָעוֹלָ֔ה וְהַחַטָּ֖את וְהָאָשָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the porch of the gate were two tables on this side, and two tables on that side: that the holocaust, and the sin offering, and the trespass offering might be slain thereon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta esihuoneessa portin edessä oli jokaisella sivulla kaksi pöytää, joilla polttouhri, rikosuhri ja vikauhri piti teurastettaman.
verses.king_james: And in the porch of the gate were two tables on this side, and two tables on that side, to slay thereon the burnt offering and the sin offering and the trespass offering.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ad latus exterius, quod ascendit ad ostium portæ quæ pergit ad aquilonem, duæ mensæ : et ad latus alterum, ante vestibulum portæ, duæ mensæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶל־הַכָּתֵ֣ף מִח֗וּצָה לָֽעוֹלֶה֙ לְפֶ֙תַח֙ הַשַּׁ֣עַר הַצָּפ֔וֹנָה שְׁנַ֖יִם שֻׁלְחָנ֑וֹת וְאֶל־הַכָּתֵ֣ף הָאַחֶ֗רֶת אֲשֶׁר֙ לְאֻלָ֣ם הַשַּׁ֔עַר שְׁנַ֖יִם שֻׁלְחָנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And on the outward side, which goeth up to the entry of the gate that looketh toward the north, were two tables: and at the other side before the porch of the gate were two tables,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ulkoisella puolella, kussa pohjaporttia päin mennään ylös, oli myös kaksi pöytää; ja toisella puolella, portin esihuoneen tykönä, oli myös kaksi pöytää.
verses.king_james: And at the side without, as one goeth up to the entry of the north gate, were two tables; and on the other side, which was at the porch of the gate, were two tables.

verses.latin_vulgate: quatuor mensæ hinc, et quatuor mensæ inde : per latera portæ octo mensæ erant, super quas immolabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַרְבָּעָ֨ה שֻׁלְחָנ֜וֹת מִפֹּ֗ה וְאַרְבָּעָ֧ה שֻׁלְחָנ֛וֹת מִפֹּ֖ה לְכֶ֣תֶף הַשָּׁ֑עַר שְׁמוֹנָ֥ה שֻׁלְחָנ֖וֹת אֲלֵיהֶ֥ם יִשְׁחָֽטוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Four tables were on this side, and four tables on that side at the sides of the gate were eight tables, upon which they slew the victims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli jokaisella sivulla porttien edessä neljä pöytää, se on kahdeksan pöytää yhteen, joilla teurastettiin.
verses.king_james: Four tables were on this side, and four tables on that side, by the side of the gate; eight tables, whereupon they slew their sacrifices.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quatuor autem mensæ ad holocaustum de lapidibus quadris exstructæ, longitudine cubiti unius et dimidii, et latitudine cubiti unius et dimidii, et altitudine cubiti unius : super quas ponant vasa in quibus immolatur holocaustum et victima.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבָּעָה֩ שֻׁלְחָנ֨וֹת לָעוֹלָ֜ה אַבְנֵ֣י גָזִ֗ית אֹ֩רֶךְ֩ אַמָּ֨ה אַחַ֤ת וָחֵ֙צִי֙ וְרֹ֨חַב אַמָּ֤ה אַחַת֙ וָחֵ֔צִי וְגֹ֖בַהּ אַמָּ֣ה אֶחָ֑ת אֲלֵיהֶ֗ם וְיַנִּ֤יחוּ אֶת־הַכֵּלִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׁחֲט֧וּ אֶת־הָעוֹלָ֛ה בָּ֖ם וְהַזָּֽבַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the four tables for the holocausts were made of square stones: one cubit and a half long, and one cubit and a half broad, and one cubit high: to lay the vessels upon, in which the holocaust and the victim is slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne neljä pöytää olivat tehdyt polttouhria varten vuojonkivistä, puolitoista kyynärää pitkäksi ja puolitoista kyynärää korkeiksi: joille pantiin kaikkinaiset aseet, joilla myös polttouhri ja muut uhrit teurastettiin.
verses.king_james: And the four tables were of hewn stone for the burnt offering, of a cubit and an half long, and a cubit and an half broad, and one cubit high: whereupon also they laid the instruments wherewith they slew the burnt offering and the sacrifice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et labia earum palmi unius, reflexa intrinsecus per circuitum : super mensas autem carnes oblationis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַֽשְׁפַתַּ֗יִם טֹ֧פַח אֶחָ֛ד מוּכָנִ֥ים בַּבַּ֖יִת סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב וְאֶל־הַשֻּׁלְחָנ֖וֹת בְּשַׂ֥ר הַקׇּרְבָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the borders of them were of one handbreadth, turned inwards round about: and upon the tables was the flesh of the offering.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tottoin kivet olivat kämmenen korkiat joka taholta; ja niille pöydille piti pantaman uhriliha.
verses.king_james: And within were hooks, an hand broad, fastened round about: and upon the tables was the flesh of the offering.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extra portam interiorem, gazophylacia cantorum in atrio interiori, quod erat in latere portæ respicientis ad aquilonem : et facies eorum contra viam australem : una ex latere portæ orientalis, quæ respiciebat ad viam aquilonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִח֩וּצָה֩ לַשַּׁ֨עַר הַפְּנִימִ֜י לִֽשְׁכ֣וֹת שָׁרִ֗ים בֶּחָצֵ֤ר הַפְּנִימִי֙ אֲשֶׁ֗ר אֶל־כֶּ֙תֶף֙ שַׁ֣עַר הַצָּפ֔וֹן וּפְנֵיהֶ֖ם דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַדָּר֑וֹם אֶחָ֗ד אֶל־כֶּ֙תֶף֙ שַׁ֣עַר הַקָּדִ֔ים פְּנֵ֖י דֶּ֥רֶךְ הַצָּפֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And without the inner gate were the chambers of the singing men in the inner court, which was on the side of the gate that looketh to the north: and their prospect was towards the south, one at the side of the east gate, which looketh toward the north.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ulkoisella puolella sisällistä porttia olivat kammiot veisaajilla sisimäisessä kartanossa, yksi sivulla pohjan porttia päin, joka katsoi etelään, toinen portin sivulla itään päin, se katsoi pohjaan.
verses.king_james: And without the inner gate were the chambers of the singers in the inner court, which was at the side of the north gate; and their prospect was toward the south: one at the side of the east gate having the prospect toward the north.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ad me : Hoc est gazophylacium quod respicit viam meridianam : sacerdotum erit, qui excubant in custodiis templi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֖ר אֵלָ֑י זֹ֣ה הַלִּשְׁכָּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר פָּנֶ֙יהָ֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַדָּר֔וֹם לַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים שֹׁמְרֵ֖י מִשְׁמֶ֥רֶת הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to me: This chamber, which looketh toward the south shall be for the priests that watch in the wards of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi minulle: se kammio, joka on etelään päin, on pappein, joiden pitää huoneessa palveleman;
verses.king_james: And he said unto me, This chamber, whose prospect is toward the south, is for the priests, the keepers of the charge of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro gazophylacium quod respicit ad viam aquilonis, sacerdotum erit, qui excubant ad ministerium altaris : isti sunt filii Sadoc, qui accedunt de filiis Levi ad Dominum ut ministrent ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַלִּשְׁכָּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר פָּנֶ֙יהָ֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַצָּפ֔וֹן לַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים שֹׁמְרֵ֖י מִשְׁמֶ֣רֶת הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ הֵ֣מָּה בְנֵֽי־צָד֗וֹק הַקְּרֵבִ֧ים מִבְּנֵֽי־לֵוִ֛י אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה לְשָׁרְתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the chamber that looketh towards the north shall be for the priests that watch over the ministry of the altar. These are the sons of Sadoc, who among the sons of Levi, come near to the Lord, to minister to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta se kammio pohjaan päin on niiden pappein, jotka alttarilla palvelevat; ne ovat Zadokin lapset, joiden pitää Levin lapsista astuman Herran eteen, häntä palvelemaan.
verses.king_james: And the chamber whose prospect is toward the north is for the priests, the keepers of the charge of the altar: these are the sons of Zadok among the sons of Levi, which come near to the Lord to minister unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est atrium longitudine centum cubitorum, et latitudine centum cubitorum per quadrum : et altare ante faciem templi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨מׇד אֶת־הֶחָצֵ֜ר אֹ֣רֶךְ ׀ מֵאָ֣ה אַמָּ֗ה וְרֹ֛חַב מֵאָ֥ה אַמָּ֖ה מְרֻבָּ֑עַת וְהַמִּזְבֵּ֖חַ לִפְנֵ֥י הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the court a hundred cubits long, and a hundred cubits broad foursquare: and the altar that was before the face of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi esihuoneen sata kyynärää pitkäksi ja sata kyynärää leveäksi, nelikulmaiseksi; ja alttari oli juuri templin edessä.
verses.king_james: So he measured the court, an hundred cubits long, and an hundred cubits broad, foursquare; and the altar that was before the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me in vestibulum templi : et mensus est vestibulum quinque cubitis hinc, et quinque cubitis inde : et latitudinem portæ trium cubitorum hinc, et trium cubitorum inde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִאֵ֘נִי֮ אֶל־אֻלָ֣ם הַבַּ֒יִת֒ וַיָּ֙מָד֙ אֵ֣ל אֻלָ֔ם חָמֵ֤שׁ אַמּוֹת֙ מִפֹּ֔ה וְחָמֵ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת מִפֹּ֑ה וְרֹ֣חַב הַשַּׁ֔עַר שָׁלֹ֤שׁ אַמּוֹת֙ מִפּ֔וֹ וְשָׁלֹ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת מִפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the porch of the temple: and he measured the porch five cubits on this side, and five cubits on that side: and the breadth of the gate three cubits on this side, and three cubits on that side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei minun templin esihuoneesen ja mittasi esihuoneen oven päällisen, viisi kyynärää kummallekin puolelle, ja portin leveyden kolme kyynärää molemmin puolin.
verses.king_james: And he brought me to the porch of the house, and measured each post of the porch, five cubits on this side, and five cubits on that side: and the breadth of the gate was three cubits on this side, and three cubits on that side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Longitudinem autem vestibuli viginti cubitorum, et latitudinem undecim cubitorum, et octo gradibus ascendebatur ad eam. Et columnæ erant in frontibus : una hinc, et altera inde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֣רֶךְ הָאֻלָ֞ם עֶשְׂרִ֣ים אַמָּ֗ה וְרֹ֙חַב֙ עַשְׁתֵּ֣י עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה אַמָּ֔ה וּבַֽמַּעֲל֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר יַעֲל֖וּ אֵלָ֑יו וְעַמֻּדִים֙ אֶל־הָ֣אֵילִ֔ים אֶחָ֥ד מִפֹּ֖ה וְאֶחָ֥ד מִפֹּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the length of the porch was twenty cubits, and the breadth eleven cubits, and there were eight steps to go up to it. And there were pillars in the fronts: one on this side, and another on that side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta esihuone oli kaksikymmentä kyynärää pitkä ja yksitoistakymmentä kyynärää leveä, ja astuimet, joista mentiin ylös; ja patsaat olivat oven päällisten tykönä, yksi kummallakin puolella.
verses.king_james: The length of the porch was twenty cubits, and the breadth eleven cubits; and he brought me by the steps whereby they went up to it: and there were pillars by the posts, one on this side, and another on that side.
